attributes.custom.operation.name: web.request
attributes.custom.resource.name: POST /

attributes.custom.operation.name: prisma.client
attributes.custom.db.statement: SELECT "public"."Assignment"."id", "public"."Assignment"."dailyLogId", "public"."Assignment"."bucketId", "public"."Assignment"."userId" FROM "public"."Assignment" WHERE ("public"."Assignment"."id" = $1 AND 1=1) LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-4b49df879e6b7a66-01' */

attributes.custom.operation.name: prisma.client
attributes.custom.db.statement: SELECT "public"."TaskProgress"."id", "public"."TaskProgress"."assignmentId", "public"."TaskProgress"."taskDefinitionId", "public"."TaskProgress"."status", "public"."TaskProgress"."completedAt", "public"."TaskProgress"."supportedByUserId", "public"."TaskProgress"."completedByUserId" FROM "public"."TaskProgress" WHERE (("public"."TaskProgress"."assignmentId" = $1 AND "public"."TaskProgress"."taskDefinitionId" = $2) AND 1=1) LIMIT $3 OFFSET $4 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-32c1e2035c0f9947-01' */

attributes.custom.operation.name: prisma.client
attributes.custom.db.statement: SELECT "public"."DailyLog"."id", "public"."DailyLog"."date" FROM "public"."DailyLog" WHERE ("public"."DailyLog"."id") IN (SELECT "t1"."dailyLogId" FROM "public"."Assignment" AS "t1" WHERE ("t1"."userId" IS NOT NULL AND "t1"."dailyLogId" IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY "public"."DailyLog"."date" ASC OFFSET $1 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-912cebc6985c98cc-01' */

SELECT "public"."DailyLog"."id", "public"."DailyLog"."date", "public"."DailyLog"."createdAt" FROM "public"."DailyLog" WHERE ("public"."DailyLog"."date" = $1 AND 1=1) LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-636742511beb4628-01' */
attributes.custom.operation.name: prisma.client
prisma.client
attributes.custom.db.statement: SELECT "public"."Bucket"."id", "public"."Bucket"."title", "public"."Bucket"."description", "public"."Bucket"."icon", "public"."Bucket"."color", "public"."Bucket"."order" FROM "public"."Bucket" WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY "public"."Bucket"."order" ASC OFFSET $1 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-a280fa4a0bbd7797-01' */

SELECT "public"."DailyLog"."id", "public"."DailyLog"."date", "public"."DailyLog"."createdAt" FROM "public"."DailyLog" WHERE ("public"."DailyLog"."date" = $1 AND 1=1) LIMIT $2 OFFSET $3 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-636742511beb4628-01' */
attributes.custom.operation.name: prisma.client
prisma.client
attributes.custom.db.statement: SELECT "public"."TaskDefinition"."id", "public"."TaskDefinition"."content", "public"."TaskDefinition"."bucketId", "public"."TaskDefinition"."order" FROM "public"."TaskDefinition" WHERE "public"."TaskDefinition"."bucketId" IN ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7) ORDER BY "public"."TaskDefinition"."order" ASC OFFSET $8 /* traceparent='00-65e05d98479275c8b8859735ce771c62-f2906fecfca8ac8f-01' */
